title: Mewkooo's Dark Translucent
body:
**This resource pack updates the GUI to a modern semi-transparent style.**

It requires the **[TranslucencyFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/translucencyfix)** mod and currently supports Minecraft 1.21+ only.

Currently, only Chinese and English are supported. Text in other languages will not appear in white.

It is recommended to use the **[Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus)** or **[Modern UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-ui)** alongside this resource pack.

**———————————————————————**  

**此资源包将 GUI 更改为现代半透明样式。**  

它需要 **[TranslucencyFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/translucencyfix)** 模组，目前仅支持 Minecraft 1.21+。  
目前仅支持中文和英文，其他语言将无法正确显示文字为白色。

建议同时搭配 **[界面模糊背景](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus)** 或 **[现代化UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-ui)** 使用
